next_steps: Bronchoscopy with bronchoalveolar lavage for cytology, silver stain, and cultures (fungal, mycobacterial, bacterial)
Sputum induction for AFB smear and culture
Urgent management of septic shock with fluid resuscitation and vasopressors if refractory
Initiation of intravenous pentamidine if Pneumocystis jirovecii is suspected and TMP-SMX is insufficient or poorly tolerated
Bronchoscopy with bronchoalveolar lavage for comprehensive microbiology (fungal, mycobacterial, bacterial, viral studies)
Serum histoplasma antigen and cryptococcal antigen testing
Urgent stabilization of hemodynamics with balanced crystalloid resuscitation and vasopressors as indicated
Blood cultures (fungal, mycobacterial, and aerobic/anaerobic bacterial)
Lumbar puncture to rule out CNS involvement given the severity of immunocompromise
High-resolution CT chest to better characterize the nature of micronodules
